statusLine.command: input=$(cat); dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); if [ -n "$pct" ]; then echo "$dir | $model | Context: ${pct}%"; else echo "$dir | $model"; fi
